name: Mailshake Sales Engagement API
what_it_does: Sales engagement platform with REST API — enabling cold email campaigns with personalization, multi-channel outreach sequences (email + LinkedIn + phone), lead catcher for reply management, email warm-up, campaign analytics, and AI email writer for sales development teams and agencies.
use_cases: Managing cold email campaigns and follow-up sequences via Mailshake API
Querying campaign analytics (opens, replies, clicks, leads) for SDR performance reporting
Adding prospects to outreach sequences from external lead sources via API
Integrating Mailshake lead data with CRM for pipeline management
Automating prospect status updates and disposition tracking via webhook events
not_for: Transactional email and product notifications (use Postmark or SendGrid)
Marketing email to opted-in subscribers (use Mailchimp or Klaviyo)
Enterprise sales with complex account-based sequences (use Outreach or Salesloft)
best_when: A sales development team or agency wants multi-channel cold outreach (email + LinkedIn + phone) with AI-powered personalization, email warm-up, and simple campaign management in a user-friendly platform.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade account-based selling, complex multi-step workflows with CRM triggers, or extremely high volume sending requiring inbox rotation at scale.

auth.notes: API key from Mailshake account settings. Passed as X-API-KEY header. Account-scoped access. Webhook for email events (open, click, reply, lead, bounce, unsubscribe). No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes.

pricing.notes: Chicago-based company. Founded 2015. Multi-channel differentiator: email + LinkedIn + phone in single platform. AI email writing (SHAKEspeare AI). Email warm-up built-in. Lead catcher for unified reply management. Zapier integration. Podcast and content marketing strong — 'Sales Hustle' community. Popular with agencies and growing sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, prospects, recipients, and analytics. X-API-KEY header auth. Good API documentation. Campaign management includes sequence steps, personalization fields, and schedule. Lead catcher endpoint for reply management. Webhook for all email events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Campaign reads idempotent. Recipient reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Prospect addition is append-only — check for duplicate before adding.
known_agent_gotchas: X-API-KEY header — not Authorization header, non-standard name
Prospect deduplication important — check for existing recipient before API add
CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliance required — implement unsubscribe handling
LinkedIn steps in sequences require LinkedIn OAuth — not covered by API key
Email warm-up needs 2-4 weeks before full campaign volume

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliant. US data residency. X-API-KEY header auth. Cold email at scale carries reputation risk — implement proper sending hygiene. Prospect PII requires data retention policy. LinkedIn OAuth for multi-channel requires additional credential management.
